World's first AI gallery

Finding the art in neural networks. Our mission is to revolutionise the art world and to become the exclusive provider of art generated by artificial neural networks – paintings which are both unique and exclusive – whereas some try to replicate human behaviour – other take paths of their own. We just started and are looking for other ai artists to collaborate with. If you are one of them shoot us an email.

    Swirl Dance

    €430,00

As the technology progressed, the boundary that separates man and machine became thinner and thinner. Artistic paths and expressions that human artists can explore in a single lifetime are limited. There is a huge unexplored expectation in many paths that the human artist is not able to undergo.

In that light we see the intelligent machine as a tool which can illuminate us and also a character of itself in many yet undisclosed ways. We believe AI art is the next big thing and we are happy that you are here also with us getting your insight into creativity and intelligence.

Contact Us
Want to have a custom order or you are an AI artist willing to collaborate with us? Just shoot as an email and we will get back to you in no time

About us

We are a family of creators – close knit and a little crazy – providing the world’s most exclusive art form from our headquarters in Berlin, Germany. We provide beautiful AI artworks because we believe each one is a representation of the pivotal turning point for the art market and art history.

Handcrafted with love © 2024 All rights reserved.
